author: agusgarcia3007
abstract: Comprehensive sales playbook for AI agents covering cold outreach (email, WhatsApp, calls), objection handling, closing techniques, follow-up sequences, persuasion psychology, and sales methodologies. Contains 10+ closing techniques, 7 objection response frameworks, 3 email frameworks (PAS, AIDA, BAB), and 6 proven sales methodologies (SPIN, Challenger, Sandler, Straight Line, Gap Selling, 10X). Designed for B2B SaaS, digital products, and service businesses.
references: The Psychology of Selling - Brian Tracy
Never Split the Difference - Chris Voss
To Sell is Human - Daniel Pink
